org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.query.EscapeCharacter

Packages that use EscapeCharacter
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.jpa.convert
Spring Data JPA specific converter infrastructure.
org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.query
Query implementation to execute queries against JPA.
org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.support
JPA repository implementations.

    default void
    JpaRepositoryConfigurationAware.setEscapeCharacter(EscapeCharacter escapeCharacter)
    Configures the EscapeCharacter to be used with the repository.
    void
    JpaRepositoryFactory.setEscapeCharacter(EscapeCharacter escapeCharacter)
    Configures the escape character to be used for like-expressions created for derived queries.
